title: viola brevistipulata var. incisa
intro: Viola brevistipulata var. incisa is a variant of the Viola brevistipulata plant, commonly known as a type of viola or pansy, which belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). The medicinal properties of Viola brevistipulata var. incisa lie in its anthocyanins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-anxiety effects. Herbal preparations of Viola brevistipulata var. incisa may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed in moderate amounts under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
